name: Gum-Gum Diable Three-Swords Style Mouten Jet Six Hundred Pound Phoenix Cannon

issues.description: Text states 'during this turn' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'
Second effect object with trigger:'Trigger' is extraneous and has no basis in card text. Card only describes one conditional KO effect tied to the first action.
Target maxCost should be 2 (as stated in text 'cost of 2 or less'), not missing from primary effect structure
Condition should check for 'Character' with cost 8+ on own board; current string name format is non-standard. Should use HasCardOnBoard with cardType/minCost filters or equivalent.
